title: Roja Jaaneman

lines.lyrics: To mann mein bhi tu hai

lines.indian: ma Pa Dha(k) Pa ma Re' .Sa'.Re'

description: This iconic song from A. R. Rahman's debut film "Roja" introduced a revolutionary sound to Indian cinema, blending traditional Carnatic melodies with contemporary arrangements. Its haunting beauty and romantic intensity perfectly capture the film's emotional core, making it a timeless classic. The song's innovative use of instrumentation and S. P. Balasubrahmanyam's soulful rendition create an unforgettable listening experience.
trivia: "Roja Jaaneman" is the Hindi adaptation of the Tamil song "Kadhal Rojave," which marked A. R. Rahman's groundbreaking debut as a music director.
The melody is primarily based on the Carnatic Raag Hamsadhwani, known for its bright, uplifting, and majestic character, often associated with devotion and heroism.
The song's innovative soundscape, combining traditional Indian instruments with synthesizers and electronic elements, set a new benchmark for film music in India.

The film "Roja" and its soundtrack, including this song, played a significant role in bringing A. R. Rahman national and international acclaim, earning him the National Film Award for Best Music Direction.
